hero.subtitle: Frontend Engineer with 1.5 years in production. I work with React, Next.js and TypeScript at MXMart, AWS certified and looking for the next technical challenge.

about.title: About
about.p1Middle: , a Software Engineer who graduated from Universidad de Colima. I've been working professionally in frontend since early 2025: I started at
about.p1Middle2: building scheduling systems with Next.js and Chakra UI, and I'm currently at
about.p1After: working with modern stacks like TanStack Query, Zod and shadcn/ui.
about.p2Before: I care about building products where technical details translate into good experience:
about.p2Accent: performance, accessibility and architecture that can grow without breaking
about.p2After: . I've worked on full-stack projects with Supabase and Firebase, and I handle UI-to-API integration well.
about.p3Middle2: in real products, and going deeper into cloud architecture (this site is deployed on AWS with serverless services). I care about staying current with the technologies that move today's ecosystem — not for hype, but because
about.p3After: is what keeps me doing this.
